title: Elite One-Tx — King keeps USDC, Morpho made whole
status: IMPLEMENTED — unit tests green; broadcast LOCKED until King Go

goal.kingWalletUsdc: free and clear (borrow proceeds stay with King)
goal.morphoLenders: repaid in same tx via collateral fill (not King's cash)

step2_fillRail.name: CrownSeedFill
step2_fillRail.function: kingSellRss(rssAmount, minUsdcOut) — adapted so USDC out hits EliteClose adapter for Morpho repay (not raw treasury dump mid-bundle)
step2_fillRail.why: RSS has no Uni/Aero/Paraswap route. Morpho ParaswapAdapter is the industry repay-with-collateral pattern when a DEX exists; CrownSeedFill is the Kingdom equivalent — fixed $0.05 inventory fill that settles inside the same tx.
step2_fillRail.fallbackNamed: AtomicOTCFill — counterparty USDC already in the call, swaps for RSS slice, USDC to repay leg

preflight: King approve RSS to GA1 / EliteClose as required
Morpho market liquidity >= borrowAmount B (direct supply or PA reallocateTo in-bundle)

bundle.note: only if vault PA path is live with maxIn
USDC lands in King wallet — stays there

bundle.op: sell RSS slice sized to B @ priceUsdcPerRss → USDC to adapter
morphoRepay(marketParams, B or full borrowShares, onBehalf=King)
bundle.note: Morpho lenders made whole from fill proceeds

endState.kingRss: reduced by fill slice; remainder free or still posted per params

safetyGate.priority: Loan repaid + King USDC landed BEFORE any privacy move
safetyGate.atomicRule: CrownEliteClose reverts whole tx if fill/repay fails — King is never left with open Morpho debt and no cash from a half-run close
preBroadcast: eth_call must show kingUsdc +B AND borrowShares==0
King Morpho auth only to CrownEliteClose

privacyLayer.note: Runs ONLY after safetyGate green. Do not fold ZEC swap into Morpho close tx.

steps.detail: Flashbots Protect (rpc.flashbots.net) is Ethereum mainnet. On Base use a private/sequencer submission path (MEV-aware private relay or trusted Base RPC) so the close is not sitting in a public mempool sandwich window.
Borrow → repay Morpho via CrownSeedFill → King keeps USDC. Confirm receipt + debt 0 on-chain.
Privacy rail only after Step 2 confirmed. Separate tx(s).

steps.action: Send ZEC to Cake shielded wallet
steps.detail: Off-chain sovereign custody. Kingdom funds leave the hot Base surface.

buildOnGo: Deploy CrownEliteClose + KingSeedDesk filler wiring on Base
Broadcast close via Base private submission path
